title: zoysia minima
intro: Zoysia minima, also known as Zoysia grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Australia and Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Zoysia minima include its potential to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil for topical use, although its preparation and usage should be guided by a healthcare professional.
